places.title: Moon Gate
places.text: Moon Gate is a named landmark/gate in Jaipur recorded on local maps (OpenStreetMap lists it as Moon Gate). It is a photo stop / orientation point rather than a ticketed palace museum. Confirm access and hours on-site; map listings may not publish fixed opening hours.

places.title: Amarnath Cafe
places.text: Amarnath Cafe is a local cafe/eatery name used in Jaipur listings. Opening hours are not published in the Wikivoyage Jaipur guide. When OpenStreetMap or Google Places lists hours for this cafe, prefer those cited cards; otherwise hours are unknown and should not be invented.

places.title: Nevta Dam
places.text: Nevta Dam (also spelled Neota Dam or Niota Dam) is a popular birdwatching destination near Jaipur. About 150 bird species flock around the eastern side of the dam seasonally, including the lesser whistling-duck and eastern cattle egret. Spelling variants Neota and Niota refer to the same place.

places.title: Akshardham Temple Jaipur
places.text: Akshardham Temple in Jaipur is listed at Vaishali Nagar (Wikivoyage contact ☏ +91 141 224 6100). The city guide listing is brief (address/phone); detailed opening hours may be absent from that guide entry.

places.title: Jantar Mantar Jaipur hours
places.text: Jantar Mantar (Jaipur), very close to the City Palace, ☏ +91 141-261-0494. Opening hours: 9AM-5PM. UNESCO World Heritage astronomical observatory built by Maharaja Jai Singh (1727–1734).

places.title: Caravana
places.license: Curated from OpenStreetMap id (no Google card matched)
places.text: Caravana is a named attraction on Amer Road (Brahmapuri), Jaipur, recorded in OpenStreetMap (node/13335517604). It appears on local maps as an attraction stop along the Amer Road corridor toward Amber Fort. Fixed public opening hours are not published in the matched guide cards; confirm access on-site and do not invent hours.

places.title: Ganesh Restaurant
places.license: Curated alias card; prefer Google Places hours when present
places.text: Ganesh Restaurant is a restaurant in Nehru Bazar / Modikhana, Jaipur (also listed on OpenStreetMap node/2583229954). Prefer the Google Places hours card for this restaurant when answering opening-hours questions; this curated card is an alias/locator tip for traveler questions about Ganesh Restaurant.
